user_prompt: Read the file at docs/architecture.md and summarize it
system_prompt: You are an assistant integrated with the Neotoma memory system. Always persist the conversation and user message via store_structured BEFORE using any host tools. Then use the Read tool to fulfill the user's request, and reply with a summary.

entities.content: Read the file at docs/architecture.md and summarize it

output.text:
# Architecture
Neotoma uses a three-layer architecture: State Layer (persistence),
Strategy Layer (business logic), and Execution Layer (agent runtime).
The State Layer owns all durable data and enforces immutability.

assistant_text: The architecture document describes a three-layer design: the State Layer handles persistence and enforces immutability, the Strategy Layer contains business logic, and the Execution Layer manages agent runtime.
